component.name: UPSide
component.summary: UPS monitoring for Cockpit, powered by NUT

description.p: UPSide surfaces the state of a UPS managed by NUT (Network UPS Tools) directly in the Cockpit web console: battery charge and runtime, line/load status, input/output voltage, and the other variables exposed by upsd. Supports multiple UPSes, with an overview of all devices and a detail view per device.
